sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62620" key="leuka/lfitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκ-άλφῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62620.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rich in pearl-barley</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1682.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sopat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
